queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default associated with negative checking account balances and their contribution to elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical investigation into how the absence of a checking account functions as a credit risk driver and influences loan default probability.
Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating effect of extended loan durations on credit default probability and borrower stability.
